items.claim: Conor McGregor's straight left is not as fast as it was in his prime.
items.quote: is it as fast as a prime McGregor's? No

items.claim: Conor McGregor showed a lack of mental fortitude in his recent fights against Dustin Poirier.
items.quote: he was starting on I don't want to say give up mentally, but he was holding on for dear life.

items.claim: Conor McGregor has never possessed great cardio.
items.quote: He's never been a guy with great cardio

items.claim: Conor McGregor is coming off a five-year layoff from the UFC.
items.quote: after 5 years out of the game

items.claim: Conor McGregor will experience significant fatigue after five minutes of fighting.
items.quote: I think Conor McGregor is tired after 5 minutes.

items.claim: Max Holloway has the ability to dig deep and maintain high effort in fights.
items.quote: He's got the ability to dig deep in fights

items.claim: Conor McGregor will suffer from ring rust due to his long absence.
items.quote: I expect him to come back with some ring rust.
